signals.thesis: Repeated rejection from the upper Bollinger Band over 3 15m candles. OI declining alongside price — longs exiting, not a short squeeze setup. RSI at 56, overbought territory with divergence forming.
Repeated rejection from the upper Bollinger Band over 3 4h candles. OI declining alongside price — longs exiting, not a short squeeze setup. RSI at 66, overbought territory with divergence forming.
Lower-highs sequence established on the 4h. RSI rejected from 63 at the midline — failed recovery. Funding rate slightly positive: still longs to flush.

Bollinger Band lower-bounce confirmed with a 15m close above the midline. RSI reset from 32 back to 66 — momentum recovering without being extended. OI rising while price holds: real buyers stepping in.
ADX below 20 — trend strength insufficient. Chop index elevated: mean-reverting environment. Waiting for regime clarification before committing direction.

Failed to reclaim the 50-EMA on 2 attempts — each bounce weaker than the last. Volume declining on bounces, elevated on drops. OI flat while price drifts lower: not a squeeze setup, just distribution.
Repeated rejection from the upper Bollinger Band over 3 4h candles. OI declining alongside price — longs exiting, not a short squeeze setup. RSI at 74, overbought territory with divergence forming.
Regime unclear — oscillating between EMA clusters on the 15m with no follow-through. Confidence below the 0.55 threshold. No trade.
RSI 14 recovered above 60 after a clean pullback to the 20-EMA. Open interest expanding while funding rate stays neutral. L/S ratio at 1.23 — spot buyers absorbing futures pressure.

Bollinger Band lower-bounce confirmed with a 4h close above the midline. RSI reset from 34 back to 53 — momentum recovering without being extended. OI rising while price holds: real buyers stepping in.
Repeated rejection from the upper Bollinger Band over 4 15m candles. OI declining alongside price — longs exiting, not a short squeeze setup. RSI at 59, overbought territory with divergence forming.
Broke above 4h resistance with volume confirmation on the 15m. Exchange netflow negative — withdrawals outpacing deposits, consistent with accumulation rather than distribution.
